series_metadata.series_description: The purpose of this system is to retain copies of forms showing payment to outside private/public companies and organizations for goods and services warranted and reimbursement to state workers from this agency for cost of travel expenses, and to retain information regarding state and federal forms management, outstanding encumbrances, state legislature, budget information, monthly recap of daily transaction registers, etc.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: two years receipt of federal and state audit reports or next audit, whichever is later
